hero.description: End the fragmented AI tooling. ZexAI unifies multi-model AI, creator economy, and Web3 infrastructure in one ecosystem. Generate ideas → Create with AI → Compare models → Transform into digital assets → Distribute globally.

story.title: The ZexAi Vision
story.p1: AI content creation is a rapidly growing field. However, most existing platforms are built on a single tool or a single model. A content creator has to use <1>separate platforms for images, video, audio, and monetization.</1>
story.p2: This fragmented structure complicates the production process and limits the growth of the creator economy. ZexAI was designed to solve this problem.
story.p3: The platform unifies multi-model AI, creator economy, and Web3 infrastructure in a single ecosystem. ZexAI is not just an AI tool; <1>it aims to be the infrastructure platform for the next-gen creator economy.</1>
story.p4: Users generate ideas, create content with AI, compare different models, transform their content into digital assets, and distribute globally. You create, ZexAI delivers to the world.

campaign.title: ZexAI Ecosystem & Opportunities
campaign.subtitle: A decentralized ecosystem combining AI production tools, creator economy, and Web3 infrastructure in one platform. 40+ AI models, NFT production, token economy, and physical products.

vision.agentDesc: ZexAI provides 40+ AI models in a single platform. Run the same prompt across multiple models, compare results, and choose the best output.
vision.mintDesc: Generate images, videos, and audio. Mint your creations as NFTs on OpenSea and Zora with a single click. The credit-based platform offers earning through referrals, social sharing rewards, and daily quests.
vision.whyWin2: Direct OpenSea and Zora integration for NFT minting
vision.whyWin3: Referral system: Earn 5% from credit purchases of invited users

tokenomics.title: $ZEX Token Distribution Plan
tokenomics.desc: $ZEX is the core utility token of the ZexAI ecosystem. Used for AI production discounts, NFT mint fees, platform rewards, and staking. Fair, long-term, and community-focused distribution.

tiers.name: 35% — Presale / ICO
tiers.desc: 50% unlocked at listing, remaining 50% — 6-month linear vesting

tiers.name: 25% — Ecosystem & Staking Rewards
tiers.desc: Platform usage, NFT creator rewards, staking pool

tiers.name: 10% — Marketing & Partnerships
tiers.desc: Gradual release based on campaign and partnership needs

tokenomics.utilityDesc: AI production discounts, NFT mint fees, staking rewards, and platform revenue sharing. Sustainable token economy backed by deflationary mechanisms.
tokenomics.burnDesc: : 0.5% burn on transactions + 10% early unstake penalty burn + 20% of platform revenue used for buyback & burn.
tokenomics.yieldDesc: : Earn rewards by staking $ZEX. Early unstake incurs a 10% penalty that is burned.

robot.title: ZexAI Humanoid Robot - Robotics Marketplace
robot.desc: Push the boundaries of software! Be among the first to access high-performance humanoid robot technology through the ZexAI ecosystem. Secure your place in the future of robotics.
robot.raffleDesc: Earn your raffle ticket by purchasing <1>at least 10,000 ZEX</1> during the presale. Catch the chance to win a free Humanoid Robot in our viral campaign!
robot.payCCDesc: Safely process your payment via Stripe secure infrastructure. All major cards accepted.
robot.payBankDesc: Contact our sales team for Bank Transfer or Swift instructions. Minimum order amount applies for bank transfers.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the ZexAI ecosystem.
faq.q1: What is ZexAI and what does it do?
faq.a1: ZexAI is a production platform powered by multi-model AI architecture. It provides access to 40+ AI models, image/video/audio generation, model comparison, digital asset creation, and a token-based creator economy. The platform unifies AI production tools, creator economy, and Web3 infrastructure in one ecosystem.
faq.a2: $ZEX token is used for AI production discounts, NFT mint fees, platform rewards, and staking. It is backed by deflationary mechanisms: 0.5% burn on transactions, 10% early unstake penalty burn, and 20% of platform revenue used for buyback & burn.
faq.q3: How does the credit system work?
faq.a3: AI production runs on a credit system. Ways to earn credits: subscription plans, credit purchases, referral system (earn 5% from invited users' credit purchases), social sharing rewards, and daily quests (login, generation, sharing). Subscription credits do not expire at month end.
faq.q4: What is the token distribution and lock schedule?
faq.a4: Total supply is 1 billion ZEX. Presale 35% (50% unlocked at listing, 50% 6-month vesting), Ecosystem 25% (gradual), Liquidity 15% (locked), Marketing 10% (gradual), Team 10% (1-year full lock + 24-month linear), Advisors 5% (6-month lock + 6-month linear). Team tokens are fully locked for 1 year — we are here to stay.
